codeReview.summary: The fix resolves two prior gaps (placeholder/raw-transport assertions and cargo-based skip gating) by dispatching real runtime ECDH and correlating request_id on the initiator, but it still does not implement the required responder-side runtimeCompletions assertion keyed by the same request_id.

issues.description: The spec never asserts `runtimeCompletions` on page B for the captured `request_id`. Instead, it substitutes responder checks (`lifecycleEvents` InboundAccepted and A-side peer last_seen) after explicitly documenting protocol asymmetry (lines 480+). This does not satisfy the feature/expectedBehavior contract that both pages observe an Ecdh completion keyed by the same request_id.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission/shared requirements are inconsistent with protocol behavior: feature metadata requires Ecdh completion on both pages, but bifrost-signer emits `CompletedOperation::Ecdh` only on the initiator.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:1402 requires responder completion; bifrost-rs/crates/bifrost-signer/src/lib.rs:1786-1813 handles responder `EcdhRequest` by returning `EcdhResponse` only, while completion is created in pending-response finalization at lib.rs:1945-1949.

sharedStateObservations.observation: runtime-worker procedure requires manual `agent-browser` verification, but this fix session did not run agent-browser despite reporting `followedProcedure: true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: runtime-worker SKILL.md section 'Required Skills' + step 6 mandates agent-browser; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId a140aa2c-be6b-4a04-b398-972544a612f1 shows no agent-browser tool invocation; handoff verification includes command runs only.

summary: Reviewed feature metadata, fix handoff/transcript, prior failing reviews, and diffs for commits 0466f80, 35ea40c, and c740ea8. The fix correctly replaces placeholder/raw-WS behavior and cargo skip gating, but it does not fulfill the explicit both-pages `runtimeCompletions` request_id assertion, so the original responder-correlation failure remains unresolved under the stated feature contract.
